name: @chbrain/khai-engine-commons
description: khai commons engine — a common-pool resource governed by its own users through crafted institutions
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: A common-pool resource governed by its own users through crafted institutions.

card.wire: Link the persona's stance toward the commons (pool, boundary, or sanction) to the expression under Projection.
card.issue: What the shared resource is running low on, and whose rules govern who may draw from it.
card.require: A resource that is genuinely shared and genuinely finite; rules that predate this scene, not invented on the spot.
card.enforce: Do not model the felt urge to free-ride or the trust between members here; that belongs to the desire, group, and conformity engines. This engine models the institution, not what it feels like to keep or break its rules.
card.setup: Name the pool being drawn from, who is inside the boundary, and what sanction awaits a rule-breaker.
